# Github Copilot Instructions for HTML & CSS Projects

## Prerequisites

## How to use Github Copilot for this project:

- Create a new react project in this existing folder.
  Follow this installations guide from this link:
  `npx create-react-router@latest my-react-router-app`

- And Please follow this folder structure from this link: https://github.com/alan2207/bulletproof-react/blob/master/docs/project-structure.md
